title: Plain White Polyfoam DIY Baubles - 3.6cm (Pack of 12) - Premium Christmas Ornaments - Perfect for Personalized Home Decor & Festive Gifts
features: PLAIN WHITE BEAUTY: Our plain white polyfoam diy baubles are the ideal blank canvas for your creative christmas decorations. With a smooth, pure white surface, these premium ornaments are perfect for bringing a touch of elegance and style to any festive setting.

PREMIUM POLYFOAM: Crafted from top-quality polyfoam, these 3.6cm baubles are lightweight, durable, and easy to work with. The excellent craftsmanship ensures they retain their perfect round shape, providing you with a sturdy and beautiful base for all your festive decorating projects.

VERSATILE SIZE: Measuring at 3.6cm, these DIY baubles are the perfect size for a variety of craft and home décor projects. Their versatile dimensions allow you to create stunning centerpieces, charming tree decorations, or one-of-a-kind gifts for your loved ones.

PERFECT FOR CREATIVE PROJECTS: Unleash your imagination! These baubles are excellent for painting, decoupage, glittering, and other artistic projects, making them a must-have for holiday craft enthusiasts of all ages.

VALUE PACK OF 12: These DIY baubles come in a value pack of 12, providing you with plenty of material for your upcoming Christmas projects or party favors. Whether you're creating festive decorations, personalized gifts, or a memorable crafting session with family and friends, our Plain White Polyfoam Baubles are the perfect choice to get you started.
description: This essential pack of designing your own Christmas baubles is perfect for any tree or garland. Create a modern touch Christmas scene. Create a sophisticated and modern Christmas scene with these durable and quality baubles.
